ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the county's law enforcement agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_types" (
  "case_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case type */,
  "case_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the case type (e.g., Sexual Assault, Assault with Child) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case type */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the case type (1-5) */,
  "recommended_sentence" TEXT /* Recommended sentence for this type of crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the case was reported */,
  "case_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of case */,
  "case_year" TEXT /* Year the case was reported */,
  "case_count" INTEGER /* Number of cases of the specified type */,
  "registry_count" INTEGER /* Number of cases involving registry offenses */,
  "pornography_count" INTEGER /* Number of cases involving pornography */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported in the county for the year */,
  "case_location" TEXT /* Specific location within the county where the case occurred */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "investigation_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the investigation began */,
  "investigation_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the investigation concluded */,
  "case_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the case (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_case_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_type_id") REFERENCES case_types ("case_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case detail entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case the detail pertains to */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "victim_age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "victim_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "offender_name" TEXT /* Name of the offender */,
  "offender_age" INTEGER /* Age of the offender */,
  "offender_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the offender */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "arrest_date" TEXT /* Date of arrest */,
  "trial_date" TEXT /* Date of trial */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Specific location of the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident occurred */,
  "victim_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship between the victim and the offender */,
  "evidence_collected" TEXT /* List of evidence collected during the investigation */,
  "witnesses" TEXT /* List of witnesses involved in the case */,
  "conviction_status" TEXT /* Status of the conviction (e.g., convicted, not convicted, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_details_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, detective, analyst) */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the user is assigned to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or unit the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "security_level" INTEGER /* Security clearance level of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the case */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access (e.g., browser, OS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed, trend analysis) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "sharing_status" TEXT /* Whether the report can be shared outside the agency */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
